content.en:
Like the last time the Tianjiao Tournament held in the Taichao Domain was only participated in by some of the other side level geniuses, there were many other side level geniuses who were not very interested.

For example, those other shore-level geniuses who are eager to break through as the origin realm are only one step away from breaking through, so they are naturally too lazy to participate in such a competition.

They don't need to be famous, they don't need that opportunity.

For them, the breakthrough is the most important thing.

But now it's different, the opportunity to enter Fengya Island is more important than any chance!

So, they're all here!

After all, once this opportunity is missed, no one knows how many years it will take to have the next opportunity.

......

Ye Tian sat cross-legged, quietly waiting for the arrival of the envoy from Wind Tooth Island.

Only when the messenger arrives, will the assessment of Fengya Island be carried out.

Time passes slowly.

After a long time.

The messenger of Stormtooth Island is here!

Rumble!

In the distant void, an incomparably large creature stirred up the Origin Black River.

"It's an Origin Kun Beast that can swim in the Origin Black River!"

An Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor spoke.

This Origin Kun Beast was comparable to the existence of the Origin Realm, and its strength was incomparably strong.

Moreover, in the Origin Black River, the ordinary Origin Realm was no match for this Origin Kun Beast.

At this time.

This Origin Kun Beast had several Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors on its body, and the leader of them was wearing a white battle armor, exuding a terrifying aura all over his body, distorting the rules around him.

It wasn't until the other party got down from the Origin Kun Beast that the terrifying aura converged.

"I've seen the Lord of the White Capital!"

"I've seen the Lord of the White Capital!"

"I've seen the Lord of the White Capital!"

A Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor said respectfully.

From the reactions of these Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, it could be seen that the strength of this Lord of the White Capital must be extremely strong, and it is very likely that he is no less than the Lord of Taichao.

The Lord of the White Capital nodded slightly, and immediately looked at the many other level geniuses.

"There are a lot of other shore-level geniuses who want to join us on Fengya Island this time, but this time only thirty-six other-level geniuses will be recruited, and the other other-level geniuses will go back wherever they want to go when the time comes. "

"Let me talk about the assessment rules this time!"

"I will take you to a special area of the Origin Black River, where a group of special creatures live - Void Arowana, and each Void Arowana has a Void Dragon Crystal in its body. Your task is to collect a hundred Void Dragon Crystals in an ancient era, and whoever collects them can participate in the next assessment. "

The Lord of the White Capital said.

At this time, the Lord of Gu Heng stood up and said, "Lord of the White Capital, let them go to the Origin Black River to hunt the Void Dragonfish, this is too dangerous, right?"

He was worried about his son, what if he fell into the Origin Black River?

After all, such an assessment would definitely not allow them, the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, to participate!

You must know that even if the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor enters the Origin Black River, there is a certain danger!

Rumble!!!!!

A terrifying force suppressed it, causing the Lord of Gu Heng's face to change and his body to bend down.

"What, are you not satisfied with the assessment method of Fengya Island? If you are afraid of death, you can give up this assessment, we are not short of a genius on Fengya Island. Moreover, even if he joins Fengya Island, there are many fallen geniuses on the other side. If you're afraid of death, just stay in the east forever, don't think about going out!"

The Lord of the White Capital said coldly.

The Lord of Gu Heng didn't dare to speak.

"If you are willing to participate in the assessment, follow me to the Origin Kun Beast, and the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors will be waiting here!"

As he spoke, the Lord of the White Capital came to the Origin Kun Beast.

And one after another other genius also followed.

Ye Tian naturally entered the Origin Kun Beast without hesitation.

However, those eight-time bone transformation realm other level geniuses did not follow, they chose to give up.

First of all, their strength is not good, they are only eight bone transformation realm geniuses, and this time they came here to see if there is any hope of passing the assessment of Wind Tooth Island, and if there is any hope of passing, they will participate.

But this time, there is obviously no hope of passing, and there is even a high possibility of falling!

So, they had to give up!

And the Lord of the Ancient Void also gave up and was brought back by the Lord of the Ancient Heng.

Therefore, among the other side-level geniuses who participated in the assessment of Fengya Island this time, only Ye Tian had an eight-time bone transformation realm, and the other other-level geniuses were all nine-time bone transformation realms.

......

Airplanes!!!

The Origin Kun Beast moved, and flew directly into the Origin Black River.

Subsequently, it shuttled through the Origin Black River at an extremely terrifying speed, and the Origin Black River water along the way could not approach its body, so it would not affect the many other side level geniuses on its back.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, the destination arrived.

"This is it!"

The voice of the Lord of the White Capital reached the ears of many other level geniuses.

This area looks no different from the rest of the Origin Black River, but it is inhabited by Void Arowana.

"You guys go down, you can look for the Void Dragon Fish in this area, find a hundred Void Dragon Crystals, and you can come back. After an ancient age, I have to come back, and if I can't come back, I'll just leave. When the time comes, find your own way back to the east!"

The words of the Lord of the White Capital were extremely ruthless, but the other other shore-level geniuses felt that it was normal.

Whoa!!!

One by one, the other side level geniuses entered this Origin Black River area and disappeared.

In the blink of an eye, all the other side-level geniuses left.

Then.

The Lord of the White Capital looked at the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors on Wind Tooth Island: "This time, there is even an eight-time Bone Transformation Realm to participate in the assessment, do you think he has any hope of passing the first assessment?"

"There is definitely no hope!" a Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor shook his head, "The eighth-time Bone Transformation Realm's other-level genius can't even deal with a Void Arowana, not to mention that there may even be a Void Arowana in the Origin Realm here, even if it is a nine-time Bone Transformation Realm-level genius, the life-saving means are a little worse, and there is no way to escape." This eight-time bone transformation realm-level genius is afraid that he doesn't even have any hope of survival. "

"Since the other party dares to participate, maybe there are really certain means!"

The Lord of the White Capital said with a smile.

"I don't think it's possible, the cultivation strength is here, how to pass the assessment?"

Several other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were not optimistic about Ye Tian at all.

"He's not simple!" said the Lord of the White Capital with a smile, "I sensed a special aura from his body, and it was the aura that belonged to the golden body of the complete other side. Moreover, his will should have reached the will of the Origin Realm. "
